title: Non-native JS navigator
message: Users get JS-driven transitions and gestures from @react-navigation/bottom-tabs, instead of platform-native navigation behavior.
help: Use `@react-navigation/native-stack` (or `native-tabs` in v7+) for real native transitions and gestures.
